response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 34 years of breadth and proven technical leadership, but fundamentally misaligned with this Principal-level role's specialized domain. Growth/Experimentation Systems requires specific expertise in A/B testing, feature flagging, metrics infrastructure, and rollout management—none of which appear in the resume. For a Principal IC6 role, immediate domain leadership is expected; this candidate would require significant onboarding in the core focus area.
strengths: Exceptional breadth and depth: 34 years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems with mastery of required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, C#)
Strong technical leadership and mentoring: multiple Staff/Senior roles, founded/maintains open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial), created workshops on testing and TDD
Proven systemic architecture at scale: Dunnhumby infrastructure handling millions of HTTP requests/second, full-stack platform work at re:cinq, multi-team coordination across products
concerns: No experimentation platform, A/B testing, or feature-flagging experience—this is the core focus of the role and entirely absent from background
Missing explicit high-availability/multi-region distributed systems expertise; resume emphasizes breadth over depth in reliability engineering and global failover
No demonstrated metrics, telemetry infrastructure, or measurement platform work; growth systems require specialized knowledge in instrumentation and analysis foundations

key_factors.factor: Exceptional technical leadership and systems design skills
Limited distributed systems and SRE emphasis
